scripts.build: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs build "npx tsc -b && npx vite build"
scripts.tauri:android:init: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs android-init "npx tauri android init"
scripts.tauri:android:dev: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs android-dev "npx tauri android dev"
scripts.tauri:android:build: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs android-build "npx tauri android build --apk"
scripts.tauri:ios:init: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs ios-init "npx tauri ios init"
scripts.tauri:ios:dev: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs ios-dev "npx tauri ios dev"
scripts.tauri:ios:build: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs ios-build "npx tauri ios build"
scripts.tauri:ios:run: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs ios-run "npx tauri ios run"
scripts.tauri:windows:build:nsis: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs windows-build-nsis "npx tauri build --bundles nsis --no-sign"
scripts.tauri:windows:build:msi: node scripts/run-with-log.mjs windows-build-msi "npx tauri build --bundles msi --no-sign"
